body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Use new convenience constructors for all tutorials and experiments.

These changes are mostly not behavior-changing, but some experiments now use more default parameters so their output may have changed slightly. The overall shapes and order of magnitude of outputs has remained the same.

## Content
CanopyModel
- [x] docs/src/tutorials/standalone/Canopy/canopy_tutorial.jl
- [x] experiments/Standalone/Vegetation/no_vegetation.jl
- [x] experiments/Standalone/Vegetation/timestep_test.jl
- [x] experiments/Standalone/Vegetation/varying_lai_with_stem.jl
- [x] experiments/Standalone/Vegetation/varying_lai.jl

SoilCanopyModel
- [x] docs/src/tutorials/integrated/soil_canopy_tutorial.jl
- [x] experiments/integrated/fluxnet/ozark_pft.jl
- [x] experiments/integrated/global/global_soil_canopy.jl
- [x] experiments/integrated/performance/conservation/ozark_conservation_setup.jl
- [x] experiments/integrated/performance/integrated_timestep_test.jl

## To do
- [x] verify no major changes for soilcanopy models
- [x] rebase on main (some conflicts)

## Changes from using default values
I think these changes are fine, just noting them here for posterity
- experiments/standalone/Vegetation/varying_lai.jl: 2 spikes in LHF, transpiration around 225 days; lower GPP/respiration/transpiration in days 100-130
- experiments/standalone/Vegetation/varying_lai_with_stem.jl: lower GPP magnitude
- experiments/Standalone/Vegetation/timestep_test.jl: slightly larger mean error ? very small change, hard to tell visually; convergence behavior stays the same

## Unchanged simulations
- docs/src/tutorials/integrated/soil_canopy_tutorial.jl
- docs/src/tutorials/standalone/Canopy/canopy_tutorial.jl
- experiments/integrated/fluxnet/ozark_pft.jl
- experiments/integrated/fluxnet/ozark_conservation.jl
- experiments/Standalone/Vegetation/no_vegetation.jl
- experiments/integrated/global/global_soil_canopy.jl
- experiments/integrated/performance/integrated_timestep_test.jl
title: use new canopy and soil constructors in tutorials and experiments
